full_text:
GPT-5.4 Thinking and GPT-5.4 Pro are rolling out now in ChatGPT.

GPT-5.4 is also now available in the API and Codex.

GPT-5.4 brings our advances in reasoning, coding, and agentic workflows into one frontier model. https://t.co/1hy6xXLAmJ

We’re acquiring Promptfoo.

Their technology will strengthen agentic security testing and evaluation capabilities in OpenAI Frontier. Promptfoo will remain open source under the current license, and we will continue to service and support current customers.

Codex Security—our application security agent—is now in research preview.

https://t.co/JG2uwGUJFv

We're publishing a new evaluation suite and research paper on Chain-of-Thought (CoT) Controllability.

We find that GPT-5.4 Thinking shows low ability to obscure its reasoning—suggesting CoT monitoring remains a useful safety tool. https://t.co/isZkNkPXZm

GPT-5.3 Instant in ChatGPT is now rolling out to everyone.

More accurate, less cringe.

https://t.co/oJpXsp9TBc

gpt-oss is out!

we made an open model that performs at the level of o4-mini and runs on a high-end laptop (WTF!!)

(and a smaller one that runs on a phone).

super proud of the team; big triumph of technology.

deepseek's r1 is an impressive model, particularly around what they're able to deliver for the price.

we will obviously deliver much better models and also it's legit invigorating to have a new competitor! we will pull up some releases.

welcome to the world, little guy!

he came early and is going to be in the nicu for awhile. he is doing well and it’s really nice to be in a little bubble taking care of him.

i have never felt such love. https://t.co/wFF2FkKiMU

text: Meet Granite-4.0-1B-Speech: a multilingual speech recognition model that's quietly changing how machines understand human voices. It's not just another ASR model. It's a compact powerhouse that understands multiple languages natively. Perfect for developers who need accuracy without massive compute.

Why developers love it: 37K+ downloads speak volumes. Handles 5 major languages out of the box. Lightweight enough for edge deployment. Transformer architecture ensures state-of-the-art accuracy. Perfect balance of size and capability for production speech applications.

message: Breaking: DeepSeek-V4 release candidate leaked. It appears to use a novel hybrid MoE-RAG architecture that reduces hallucination by 40% in technical tasks.
